backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a flight logbook backend with CRUD operations for students, instructors, aircraft, exercises, and flight logs, plus CSV export and reporting functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the CSV export filename format change to 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_YYYY-MM-DD.csv' in the ExportButton component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including components, hooks, utilities, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark themes with aviation-themed color palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with title 'Pilot Flight Logbook' and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing tab navigation between flight entry, logs, reports, and export views, with entity creation dialogs and edit state management.
Reusable dialog component for creating students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises with form validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: Button component that exports flight logs to CSV with filename format 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_YYYY-MM-DD.csv' using date-fns for date formatting.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogForm.ts: Form component for creating and updating flight logs with calendar date picker, time inputs, entity selectors, validation, and automatic reset after submission.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogTable.t: Displays a table of flight logs with edit and delete actions, using React Query hooks to fetch and mutate data. Includes a confirmation dialog for deletions and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/InstructorReport: Renders a card with a table showing instructor statistics (total hours and flight count). Uses the useInstructorReport hook to fetch data with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/StudentReport.ts: Renders a card with a table displaying student total flight hours. Uses the useStudentReport hook to fetch data with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the ICP actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEntities.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises, plus a mutation hook for creating entities. All queries depend on the actor being initialized.
frontend/src/hooks/useFlightLogs.ts: Provides React Query hooks for flight log CRUD operations, resolving foreign keys to display names. Includes queries for fetching all logs and mutations for create, update, and delete operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider using @dfinity/auth-client. Manages login state, identity persistence, and provides hooks for authentication operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useReports.ts: Provides React Query hooks for generating student and instructor reports by aggregating flight hours and counts. Fetches data from the actor and resolves entity names.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space. Includes base styles for borders and body.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the DOM root.
frontend/src/utils/timeCalculations.ts: Utility functions for parsing time strings (HH:MM), formatting minutes to human-readable format, and calculating flight duration with midnight crossing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens for a component library.
project_state.json: Project metadata for a Pilot Flight Logbook application tracking architectural decisions, known issues (CSV export filename bug), and implemented features for flight logging, student/instructor management, and reporting.
